Package: imageTCGA

Ilaria Billato

Department of Biology, University of Padova

2026-04-10

Source: vignettes/pkg-imageTCGA.Rmd
pkg-imageTCGA.Rmd

Overview

GitHub: https://github.com/billila/imageTCGA

imageTCGA is a Shiny application for interactive exploration of the TCGA diagnostic image database. It provides clinical and geographical filtering of ~11,765 images from ~9,640 patients, and generates ready-to-run GenomicDataCommons R code for downloading selected images.

Launch the app 

library(imageTCGA)
imageTCGA::imageTCGA()

Features

Clinical filtering

The left panel allows filtering by:

  • Project (cancer type, e.g. TCGA-OV, TCGA-BRCA)
  • Histological type (morphology code)
  • Tumour grade and stage

Dot plots

For gynaecological tumours (BRCA, OV, UCS, UCEC), dot plots show the distribution of images across clinical strata.

Interactive maps

Images are annotated with the contributing institution. The map tab displays image origins at three levels:

  • Institution (centre name)
  • US state
  • Country

Code generation

After applying filters, the Generate code panel produces a GenomicDataCommons query that reproduces the current selection:

# Example of generated code:
library(GenomicDataCommons)
files() |>
    filter(
        ~ cases.project.project_id == "TCGA-OV" &
          data_type == "Slide Image" &
          experimental_strategy == "Diagnostic Slide"
    ) |>
    results(size = 100)

Copy this code into your R session, then pass the file_id column to gdcdata() to download the SVS files.

Session Information 

sessioninfo::session_info()
#> ─ Session info ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#>  setting  value
#>  version  R version 4.5.3 (2026-03-11)
#>  os       Ubuntu 24.04.4 LTS
#>  system   x86_64, linux-gnu
#>  ui       X11
#>  language en
#>  collate  C.UTF-8
#>  ctype    C.UTF-8
#>  tz       UTC
#>  date     2026-04-10

#>  quarto   NA
#>
